label: UKMTO: Critical
description: Iran reasserted closure of the Strait of Hormuz on 18 Apr 2026 in response to the US naval blockade (effective 13 Apr). IRGC conducted at least three attacks on commercial shipping that day, including VLCC Sanmar Herald and two Indian-flagged tankers; a container ship was struck by an unknown projectile. UKMTO red alert remains active across the Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, Gulf of Oman and parts of the Arabian Sea. Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb held at moderate with Houthi escalation rhetoric ongoing.
